name: Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Put shredded zucchini in a strainer and press or squeeze with hands to remove excess liquid.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs, sugar, and oil together until well combined.
3. Gradually add flour, baking powder, soda, cinnamon, salt, vanilla extract, and chopped nuts to the egg mixture. Mix by hand until just combined.
4. Add the zucchini (minus the excess liquid) to the batter and mix gently until incorporated.
5. Grease two loaf pans with butter or cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for about 15 minutes before removing and transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
